# Model for exploration planning
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
import torch.nn.functional as F
import numpy as np

class ExplorationPlanner(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, input_channels=1, hidden_dim=256):
        super().__init__()
        
        # Convolutional layers for processing global map
        self.conv_layers = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Conv2d(input_channels, 32, kernel_size=3, padding=1),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.MaxPool2d(2),
            nn.Conv2d(32, 64, kernel_size=3, padding=1),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.MaxPool2d(2),
            nn.Conv2d(64, 128, kernel_size=3, padding=1),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d((8, 8))
        )
        
        # Calculate conv output size
        conv_out_size = 128 * 8 * 8
        
        # Process robot position
        self.pos_fc = nn.Linear(2, 64)
        
        # Process frontiers
        self.frontier_fc = nn.Linear(2, 64)
        self.frontier_pool = nn.AdaptiveMaxPool1d(10)  # Limit to 10 frontiers
        
        # Process nodes
        self.node_fc = nn.Linear(2 + 1 + 1, 64)  # coords + utility + visited
        
        # Process neighbors
        self.neighbor_fc = nn.Linear(2, 64)  # coords
        
        # Attention mechanism to focus on relevant parts
        self.attention_conv = nn.MultiheadAttention(embed_dim=conv_out_size, num_heads=8, batch_first=True)
        
        # Combine all features
        total_features = conv_out_size + 64 + 64 + 64 + 64
        self.combined_fc = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Linear(total_features, hidden_dim),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, hidden_dim // 2),
            nn.ReLU(),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
        )
        
        # Output layer to score each neighbor
        self.output_layer = nn.Linear(hidden_dim // 2, 1)  # Score each neighbor
    
    def forward(self, global_map, robot_pos, frontiers, nodes, neighbors):
        batch_size = global_map.size(0)
        
        # Process global map through conv layers
        conv_features = self.conv_layers(global_map.unsqueeze(1))  # Add channel dim
        conv_features = conv_features.view(batch_size, -1)  # Flatten
        
        # Process robot position
        pos_features = F.relu(self.pos_fc(robot_pos))
        
        # Process frontiers
        if len(frontiers) == 0:
            frontier_features = torch.zeros((batch_size, 64), device=global_map.device)
        else:
            frontier_tensor = torch.tensor(frontiers, dtype=torch.float32, device=global_map.device)
            frontier_features = F.relu(self.frontier_fc(frontier_tensor))
            if frontier_features.size(0) < 10:
                # Pad with zeros if fewer than 10 frontiers
                pad_size = 10 - frontier_features.size(0)
                frontier_features = torch.cat([frontier_features, 
                                             torch.zeros((pad_size, 64), device=global_map.device)], dim=0)
            else:
                # Take first 10 if more than 10
                frontier_features = frontier_features[:10]
            frontier_features = self.frontier_pool(frontier_features.t().unsqueeze(0)).squeeze(0).t()  # Max pool
            frontier_features = frontier_features.mean(dim=0, keepdim=True)  # Average to get size (1, 64)
            frontier_features = frontier_features.expand(batch_size, -1)  # Expand to match batch size
        
        # Process nodes
        if len(nodes) == 0:
            node_features = torch.zeros((batch_size, 64), device=global_map.device)
        else:
            node_coords = torch.tensor([[node['coords'][0], node['coords'][1]] for node in nodes], 
                                      dtype=torch.float32, device=global_map.device)
            node_utility = torch.tensor([[node['utility']] for node in nodes], 
                                       dtype=torch.float32, device=global_map.device)
            node_visited = torch.tensor([[float(node['visited'])] for node in nodes], 
                                       dtype=torch.float32, device=global_map.device)
            node_tensor = torch.cat([node_coords, node_utility, node_visited], dim=1)
            node_features = F.relu(self.node_fc(node_tensor))
            node_features = torch.mean(node_features, dim=0, keepdim=True)  # Average pooling, size (1, 64)
            node_features = node_features.expand(batch_size, -1)  # Expand to match batch size
        
        # Process neighbors
        if len(neighbors) == 0:
            neighbor_features = torch.zeros((batch_size, 64), device=global_map.device)
        else:
            neighbor_tensor = torch.tensor(neighbors, dtype=torch.float32, device=global_map.device)
            neighbor_features = F.relu(self.neighbor_fc(neighbor_tensor))
            neighbor_features = torch.mean(neighbor_features, dim=0, keepdim=True)  # Average pooling, size (1, 64)
            neighbor_features = neighbor_features.expand(batch_size, -1)  # Expand to match batch size
        
        # Combine all features
        combined_input = torch.cat([
            conv_features,
            pos_features,
            frontier_features,
            node_features,
            neighbor_features
        ], dim=1)
        
        # Pass through combined layers
        combined_features = self.combined_fc(combined_input)
        
        # Score each neighbor (this will be called multiple times in the prediction loop)
        scores = self.output_layer(combined_features)
        
        return scores
